home.aboutText: Dedicated to spiritual enlightenment, social service, and preservation of Indian cultural values through katha, satsang, seva, education, and healthcare initiatives.
home.founderQuote: Our mission is to unite bhakti with seva. When devotion transforms into compassionate action, society receives strength, culture receives continuity, and humanity receives hope.

meta.title: About
meta.description: About Bhagwat Heritage Service Foundation Trust.

about.introText: Bhagwat Heritage Service Foundation Trust is a spiritual and social movement dedicated to values, service, and cultural preservation. Through satsang, katha, education support, healthcare initiatives, and community outreach, the trust works for meaningful transformation in society.

missionCards.title: Bhakti
missionCards.desc: Religious programs, Bhagwat katha, and spiritual upliftment.

missionCards.title: Seva
missionCards.desc: Selfless service, social support, and community welfare activities.

missionCards.title: Sanskriti
missionCards.desc: Preservation and promotion of Indian culture and values.

milestones.title: Spiritual Journey Began
milestones.desc: The trust started with satsang, guidance, and values-driven service.

milestones.title: Community Seva Expanded
milestones.desc: Education, healthcare, and social welfare initiatives scaled across communities.

milestones.title: Youth & Culture Programs
milestones.desc: Focused initiatives launched for youth direction and cultural continuity.

milestones.title: Continuing Impact
milestones.desc: Bhakti, seva, and sanskriti remain the foundation of our growth and outreach.

about.ctaTitle: Seva Se Samaj, Sanskar Se Rashtra
about.ctaDesc: Become part of this divine journey. Your support helps us deliver service, education, and cultural awakening to more families every year.

spiritual.title: Spiritual Mission
spiritual.subtitle: Bhakti . Satsang . Scriptural Guidance

schedule.title: Mangala Smaran
schedule.detail: Early morning prayer, mantra remembrance, and scriptural reflection.

schedule.title: Daytime Satsang Guidance
schedule.detail: Pravachan, value-based guidance, and spiritual learning support.

schedule.title: Sandhya Bhakti Window
schedule.detail: Bhajan, katha, collective prayer, and family satsang alignment.

deliveryItems: Daily digital satsang follow-up and replay
Youth and family spiritual practice pathways
spiritual.aboutText1: The spiritual mission of Bhagwat Heritage is to connect people with divine wisdom through katha, satsang, prayer, study, and practical dharmic living.
spiritual.aboutText2: This mission also nurtures seva-minded devotion, youth guidance, digital access, and cultural continuity across generations.

pillars.title: Bhagwat Katha
pillars.desc: Structured katha programs that spread devotion, scriptural wisdom, and spiritual reflection.

pillars.title: Satsang and Pravachan
pillars.desc: Regular satsang gatherings that guide families through dharma, discipline, and devotion.

pillars.title: Dhyan and Sadhana
pillars.desc: Meditation, chanting, and inner practice pathways for peace, focus, and spiritual steadiness.

pillars.title: Sanskar Formation
pillars.desc: Value-based learning for children and youth through spiritual exposure and cultural grounding.

dailyFocuses: Shravan and attentive listening to katha

social.title: Social Service Mission
social.subtitle: Compassion in Action . Service with Dignity . Community Impact
actionItems: Immediate field support through volunteers and local coordinators
Sponsor-linked assistance for recurring family needs
Trust review for medium-term education and health support
social.aboutText1: The social service mission expresses dharma through practical care. It focuses on food, water, health, education, and dignity-centered service.
social.aboutText2: This mission responds with compassion and discipline while allowing donors, volunteers, and communities to join visible trust-led impact.

activities.title: Annadan Seva
activities.desc: Daily meal support for children, elderly devotees, and families facing hardship.

activities.title: Jal Seva
activities.desc: Water camps and hydration support in summer-prone and high-need regions.

activities.title: Chikitsa Support
activities.desc: Health camps, medicine assistance, and recurring care support for the vulnerable.

activities.title: Education Assistance
activities.desc: Books, kits, and support programs for children and students in need.

activities.title: Vastra and Essentials Seva
activities.desc: Seasonal clothes, essentials, and support drives for low-income households.

operations.title: Food Seva Line
operations.detail: Meal coordination, packing, and distribution support.

operations.title: Water Support Network
operations.detail: Heat-response hydration camps and water access support.

operations.title: Medical Follow-up Desk
operations.detail: Recurring medicine support and camp follow-up review.

operations.title: Emergency Response Window
operations.detail: Volunteer escalation path for urgent family support needs.

planningCards.desc: Identify families, regions, and categories where support demand is rising.

planningCards.title: Resource Routing
planningCards.desc: Align donors, volunteers, and supplies with the right seva channel quickly.

planningCards.title: Impact Review
planningCards.desc: Track where recurring support is needed beyond one-time relief.

cultural.subtitle: Preserve tradition, celebrate heritage, build values

Connect youth with living heritage and devotional identity

cultural.aboutText1: Cultural renaissance protects and renews Sanatan values through festivals, youth formation, devotional arts, and value-based public participation.
cultural.aboutText2: It preserves heritage while making it living, active, and meaningful for modern families, children, and communities.

programs.title: Festival Preservation
programs.desc: Organizing spiritual festivals and keeping them rooted in devotion, discipline, and meaning.

programs.desc: Training children and youth through value-based camps, devotional learning, and cultural exposure.

programs.title: Art and Heritage
programs.desc: Preserving sacred music, devotional expression, and artistic traditions linked to Sanatan culture.

programs.title: Pilgrimage and Yatra
programs.desc: Connecting devotees with sacred spaces, heritage journeys, and spiritually meaningful travel.

calendar: Weekly bhajan and devotional music session

focusCards.title: Festival Continuity
focusCards.desc: Ensure annual observances stay disciplined, devotional, and community-connected.

focusCards.title: Youth Identity Formation
focusCards.desc: Make cultural learning experiential through camps, arts, and participation models.

focusCards.title: Heritage Visibility
focusCards.desc: Present Sanatan values through events, storytelling, music, and public celebration.

aboutPage.heroTagline: Shri Bhagwat Heritage Service Foundation Trust
aboutPage.heroSubtagline: Preserving Faith • Serving Humanity • Reviving Culture
aboutPage.introHeading: A Mission Rooted in Devotion and Service
aboutPage.introPara1: Shri Bhagwat Heritage Service Foundation is a spiritual and humanitarian initiative dedicated to spreading the timeless wisdom of Shrimad Bhagwat Mahapuran while serving society through compassion, cultural preservation, and value-based education.
aboutPage.introPara2: Inspired by the sacred teachings of Sanatan Dharma and guided by the spiritual vision of Sant Shri Manish Bhaiji Maharaj, the foundation works to create a harmonious connection between spiritual knowledge and practical service to humanity.
aboutPage.whatWeArePara1: The guiding inspiration of Shri Bhagwat Heritage Service Foundation is the divine wisdom contained in Shrimad Bhagwat Mahapuran — one of the most revered scriptures of Sanatan tradition.
aboutPage.whatWeArePara2: Shrimad Bhagwat teaches the path of devotion, righteousness, humility, compassion, and divine love. It presents spiritual knowledge in a way that inspires individuals to purify their hearts, cultivate devotion toward the Divine, and live a life dedicated to service and dharma.
aboutPage.whatWeArePara3: The foundation considers this scripture not only a sacred text but also a living guide for building a spiritually awakened society. By sharing the teachings of Bhagwat in a modern and accessible way, the foundation seeks to inspire individuals to bring spiritual values into their personal lives, families, and communities.
aboutPage.inspirationPara1: The guiding inspiration of Shri Bhagwat Heritage Service Foundation is the divine wisdom contained in Shrimad Bhagwat Mahapuran — one of the most revered scriptures of Sanatan tradition.
aboutPage.inspirationPara2: Shrimad Bhagwat teaches the path of devotion, righteousness, humility, compassion, and divine love. It presents spiritual knowledge in a way that inspires individuals to purify their hearts, cultivate devotion toward the Divine, and live a life dedicated to service and dharma.
aboutPage.inspirationPara3: The foundation considers this scripture not only a sacred text but also a living guide for building a spiritually awakened society. By sharing the teachings of Bhagwat in a modern and accessible way, the foundation seeks to inspire individuals to bring spiritual values into their personal lives, families, and communities.
aboutPage.inspirationQuote: Shrimad Bhagwat — A Living Guide for Spiritual Awakening and Compassionate Living

visionCards.title: Spiritual Society
visionCards.desc: Create a society where spiritual awareness, moral values, and compassionate service become guiding principles for life.

visionCards.title: Inner Clarity & Peace
visionCards.desc: Reconnect individuals with timeless teachings of Bhagwat to inspire purposeful living with devotion and integrity in a rapidly changing world.

visionCards.title: Long-Term Growth
visionCards.desc: Develop spiritual learning platforms, service initiatives, cultural programs, and sacred spaces that cultivate devotion, knowledge, and character.

aboutPage.santRoleHeading: The Role of Sant Shri Manish Bhaiji Maharaj
aboutPage.santRolePara2: Through spiritual discourses, satsang gatherings, and social initiatives, Sant Shri Manish Bhaiji Maharaj continues to inspire individuals toward a life of devotion, discipline, humility, and service.
aboutPage.santRolePara3: His teachings emphasize that true spirituality is not limited to rituals or philosophical study — it should transform the individual's character and inspire compassionate action for the welfare of society.
aboutPage.coreAreasHeading: Preserving Heritage, Connecting Devotion & Serving Humanity
aboutPage.whoWeArePara1: Shri Bhagwat Heritage Service Foundation Trust is committed to the integrated development of individuals and society through spiritual awakening, cultural preservation, and dedicated service activities.
aboutPage.whoWeArePara2: The Trust serves as a platform where Bhakti (Devotion), Seva (Service), and Sanskar (Values) come together to create meaningful transformation in human life.
aboutPage.whoWeArePara3: Through initiatives such as Bhagwat Katha, spiritual education, Gau Seva, Annadaan, youth guidance, and humanitarian service programs, the Trust continuously works to uplift society at both inner and outer levels.

coreAreas.title: Spiritual Education
coreAreas.desc: Bhagwat Katha programs, satsang gatherings, spiritual discourses, and study initiatives that help individuals understand the teachings of Shrimad Bhagwat and other sacred scriptures.

coreAreas.title: Humanitarian Service
coreAreas.desc: Service to humanity as an expression of devotion — Gau Seva, Ann Seva food distribution, medicine distribution, educational support, scholarship assistance, and disaster relief.

coreAreas.title: Cultural Preservation
coreAreas.desc: Preserving and promoting India's spiritual heritage through cultural programs, festivals, devotional practices, and educational initiatives for all generations.

coreAreas.title: Spiritual Learning Platforms
coreAreas.desc: E-Pathshala, digital learning resources, and spiritual study materials making sacred knowledge accessible to people of all ages and backgrounds.

aboutPage.buildingCultureHeading: Devotion : Connecting life with divine consciousness
aboutPage.buildingCulturePara1: One of the central principles of the foundation is that spiritual wisdom must be expressed through service. Devotion becomes meaningful when it inspires individuals to help others, uplift communities, and contribute toward collective well-being.
aboutPage.buildingCulturePara2: The foundation encourages individuals to participate in volunteer programs, service initiatives, and community activities. By working together in a spirit of devotion and responsibility, individuals develop both inner growth and social awareness.

milestones.title: Foundation Established
milestones.desc: Shri Bhagwat Heritage Service Foundation founded with a mission of spiritual and humanitarian service.

milestones.title: Bhagwat Katha Programs Begin
milestones.desc: Regular Bhagwat Katha Mahotsav programs launched to spread the teachings of Shrimad Bhagwat.

milestones.title: Humanitarian Seva Expansion
milestones.desc: Expanded Gau Seva, Ann Seva, medical camps, and education support programs across Maharashtra.

milestones.title: Chandrapur Mahamandir Vision
milestones.desc: Foundation of the 63-Ft Hanuman Murti and Mahamandir temple complex project at Dham Chandrapur.

milestones.title: Cultural Revival Programs
milestones.desc: Launched youth cultural programs, E-Pathshala, and digital spiritual learning initiatives.

milestones.title: Global Outreach & Future Growth
milestones.desc: Expanding spiritual centers, service networks, and digital platforms to inspire individuals worldwide.

aboutPage.futureParagraph: By combining the wisdom of ancient scriptures with the needs of modern society, the foundation hopes to contribute toward building a divine personality, a compassionate society, and a spiritually awakened world.

futureCards.title: Spiritual Centers
futureCards.desc: Develop sacred spaces and spiritual centers that serve as hubs of devotion, learning, and community service.

futureCards.title: Digital & Global Outreach
futureCards.desc: Expand digital learning platforms and global outreach to inspire individuals across generations and geographies.

futureCards.title: Divine Society
futureCards.desc: Combine ancient scriptural wisdom with modern needs to contribute toward a divine personality and compassionate, spiritually awakened world.

aboutPage.invitationPara1: The mission of Shri Bhagwat Heritage Service Foundation grows through the participation of sincere individuals who wish to contribute toward spiritual awareness and humanitarian service.
aboutPage.invitationPara2: Whether through volunteering, supporting service initiatives, participating in spiritual programs, or simply sharing the message of Bhagwat — every individual can become part of this collective journey.
aboutPage.invitationQuote: Together, with devotion in the heart and service in action, we move forward in the light of Shrimad Bhagwat.
aboutPage.ctaTitle: Join the Mission of Devotion, Service & Spiritual Awakening
aboutPage.ctaDesc: Every contribution — through time, resources, or participation — helps carry forward the sacred work of Shrimad Bhagwat Heritage.

founderPage.name: Sant Shri Manish Bhaiji Maharaj
founderPage.subtitle: Spiritual Guide · Bhagwat Scholar · Social Reformer
founderPage.introPara1: Sant Shri Manish Bhaiji Maharaj is a respected spiritual guide, Bhagwat scholar, and the inspirational force behind the mission of Shri Bhagwat Heritage Service Foundation. Through his teachings, discourses, and service initiatives, he continues to inspire individuals to live a life rooted in devotion, discipline, compassion, and cultural responsibility.
founderPage.introPara2: His spiritual journey reflects a deep commitment to spreading the sacred wisdom of Shrimad Bhagwat Mahapuran while guiding society toward moral strength, spiritual awareness, and service to humanity.
founderPage.inspirationPara1: From an early stage of his spiritual journey, Sant Shri Manish Bhaiji Maharaj developed deep reverence for the sacred teachings of Shrimad Bhagwat Mahapuran and the spiritual heritage of Sanatan Dharma.
founderPage.inspirationPara2: The teachings of Bhagwat emphasize devotion toward the Divine, humility in conduct, compassion toward all beings, and dedication to righteous living. These teachings became the foundation of his spiritual path.
founderPage.inspirationPara3: His teachings emphasize that spiritual wisdom should guide individuals toward inner purity, moral clarity, and compassionate service.
founderPage.kathaPara1: One of the central aspects of his mission is the presentation of Bhagwat Katha — a sacred spiritual discourse that explains the teachings of Shrimad Bhagwat Mahapuran in a meaningful and inspiring manner.
founderPage.kathaPara2: Through Bhagwat Katha programs, he shares the message of devotion, spiritual wisdom, and ethical living with large audiences. His discourses help listeners understand the deeper spiritual meaning of scriptures while encouraging them to apply those teachings in daily life.
founderPage.kathaPara3: His teachings emphasize that spiritual knowledge should inspire humility, devotion, self-discipline, and service to others.

principles.title: Devotion (Bhakti)
principles.desc: Devotion toward the Divine purifies the heart and brings inner peace. Bhakti connects the individual with divine grace and inspires righteous living.

principles.title: Wisdom (Jnana)
principles.desc: True knowledge helps individuals understand the purpose of life and develop clarity of thought and conduct.

principles.title: Service (Seva)
principles.desc: Service to humanity is a sacred duty. Helping others with compassion and sincerity reflects the true spirit of spirituality.

principles.title: Discipline (Sadhana)
principles.desc: Spiritual growth requires discipline, reflection, and dedication to spiritual practice.

principles.title: Cultural Responsibility
principles.desc: Preserving and honoring cultural heritage strengthens identity and inspires future generations.

principles.title: Compassion (Karuna)
principles.desc: Compassion softens the heart, deepens human connection, and turns spiritual values into loving action for all.

founderPage.foundationPara1: The vision of Shri Bhagwat Heritage Service Foundation emerged from the desire to create a platform where spiritual knowledge, humanitarian service, and cultural values could work together for the benefit of society.
founderPage.foundationPara2: Sant Shri Manish Bhaiji Maharaj envisioned an organization that would not only promote spiritual teachings but also encourage meaningful social initiatives that reflect compassion and responsibility.
founderPage.foundationPara3: The foundation serves as a bridge between spiritual wisdom and practical service to society.
objectives: Spreading Bhagwat wisdom through spiritual programs
Supporting spiritual education and value-based learning
Preserving cultural traditions and sacred knowledge
Inspiring youth toward disciplined and meaningful lives
founderPage.sevaPara1: Sant Shri Manish Bhaiji Maharaj strongly believes that spirituality must express itself through compassion and service. Efforts are being made to support humanitarian activities including Gau Seva, food distribution, educational assistance, and community welfare programs.
founderPage.sevaPara2: These initiatives aim to promote kindness, responsibility, and social harmony while encouraging individuals to contribute toward the welfare of others.
founderPage.sevaPara3: By connecting spiritual awareness with social service, the foundation seeks to create a positive and lasting impact on society.
founderPage.youthPara1: A key focus of his mission is guiding the younger generation toward positive values and responsible living. Modern society presents many challenges for youth — confusion about values, cultural disconnection, and lack of spiritual guidance.
founderPage.youthPara2: Through his teachings and programs, he encourages young individuals to develop discipline, confidence, moral clarity, and spiritual awareness.
founderPage.youthPara3: Youth who grow with strong values become capable of contributing meaningfully to society while maintaining cultural and spiritual roots.
founderPage.culturalPara1: Sant Shri Manish Bhaiji Maharaj envisions a society where spiritual wisdom and cultural values continue to guide human life.
founderPage.culturalPara2: His vision includes the development of spiritual learning platforms, temple projects, devotional programs, and service initiatives that help individuals connect with sacred traditions.
founderPage.culturalPara3: By nurturing both knowledge and character, the foundation seeks to support the growth of a balanced and harmonious society.
founderPage.messagePara1: Sant Shri Manish Bhaiji Maharaj often emphasizes that the transformation of society begins with the transformation of the individual.
founderPage.messagePara2: When individuals cultivate devotion, humility, compassion, and responsibility, families become stronger, communities become harmonious, and society moves toward peace and progress.
founderPage.messagePara3: The teachings of Shrimad Bhagwat remind us that human life is a precious opportunity for spiritual growth and service to others.
founderPage.messageQuote: Through devotion, wisdom, and compassionate action, every individual can contribute toward building a better world.
founderPage.journeyPara1: The mission inspired by Sant Shri Manish Bhaiji Maharaj continues to grow through the efforts of the foundation, its volunteers, supporters, and participants in spiritual programs.
founderPage.journeyPara2: The journey ahead includes expanding spiritual education initiatives, strengthening service activities, preserving cultural traditions, and sharing the message of Bhagwat with wider audiences.
founderPage.journeyPara3: Through collective dedication and sincere devotion, the foundation seeks to move forward toward a future guided by spiritual wisdom and compassionate service.
founderPage.ctaTitle: Learn More About the Mission & Join the Spiritual Journey

hanumanPage.heroTitle: Jay Shree Maharudra Kashthbhanjan Hanuman Darshan
hanumanPage.heroWelcome: Welcome to the divine abode of Hanuman Ji Maharaj. Experience devotion, strength, and spiritual peace.
hanumanPage.darshantimingsDesc: Our 63-foot Hanuman idol is a symbol of devotion and strength. The temple serves as a spiritual center for thousands of devotees.
blessings: Removes fear and negativity through devotion.
Builds discipline, confidence, and divine focus.
Strengthens family harmony and spiritual values.
Encourages seva, humility, and righteous living.
hanumanPage.sadhanaText: Begin with "Om Hanumate Namah", recite Hanuman Chalisa with devotion, and conclude with deep daan and seva sankalp. Consistent sadhana brings peace, protection, and divine energy in life.
